user_query: I'm planning a family trip to the United States and I need to find charging stations along our route. Fetch the nearest charging stations within a 5 km radius of our current location. Also, provide me with a list of users in the United States to connect with during our trip.

TaskList.description: Fetch the current location of the user to determine the starting point for finding charging stations.
Search for charging stations within a 5 km radius of the current location obtained from step 1.
Fetch a list of users in the United States that the traveler can connect with.
